infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: RemindMeHere needs your location to notify you when you arrive at or leave your saved reminder locations. Your location is never stored or sent anywhere.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: RemindMeHere needs your location to show your position on the map and detect when you're near a saved reminder location.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: RemindMeHere needs background location access to notify you when you're near a saved reminder location, even when the app is closed. Your location is never stored or sent anywhere.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: RemindMeHere needs your location to notify you when you arrive at saved places. Your location is NEVER stored or sent anywhere.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: RemindMeHere needs your location to show you on the map.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: RemindMeHere needs background location access to remind you near saved places, even when the app is closed.
